lines.line: ផ្កាយនៅឆ្ងាយ តែបងត្រូវចាប់ឲ្យបាន
lines.translation: The stars are far away, but you have to catch them
lines.phonetic: phkay now chhngay  te bng trauv chab aoyban

lines.line: ក៏ព្រោះតែអូននេះឆ្នាស់ ទើបបាក់ចិត្តលើកល្យាណ
lines.translation: It's because of me that I broke my heart
lines.phonetic: ka prohte aun nih chhnasa  teub bakchett leu kalyean

lines.line: បងមិនជឿលើវាសនា
lines.translation: I do not believe in destiny
lines.phonetic: bng min chue leu veasanea

lines.line: តើហេតុអ្វីដល់ពេលបានជួបអូនធ្វើឱ្យបងនេះគិតថា
lines.translation: Why when I met you made me think
lines.phonetic: tae hetoavei dlpel ban chuob aun thveu aoy bng nih kitthea

lines.line: ពួកយើងដូចជាគូដែលទេវតាបានចារ
lines.translation: We are like a couple written by angels
lines.phonetic: puok yeung dauchchea kou del tevta ban char

lines.line: កុំកាច កុំឆ្នាស់ពេកពៅអើយ
lines.translation: Do not be angry, do not be too young
lines.phonetic: kom kach  kom chhnasa pek pow aey

lines.line: សម្រស់អូនឱ្យបងចាញ់
lines.translation: Your beauty makes you lose
lines.phonetic: samrosa aun aoy bng chanh

lines.line: បងក៏ញ៉ោះលេងព្រោះស្រឡាញ់
lines.translation: I also play because I love
lines.phonetic: bng ka nhaoh leng proh sraleanh

lines.line: ញ៉ោះលេងព្រោះតែខ្នាញ់ហ្នឹងអូន
lines.translation: I play because I hate you
lines.phonetic: nhaoh leng prohte khnanh hnoeng aun

words.word: ខ្នាញ់ហ្នឹង

lines.line: បងចង់ឱ្យគេផ្សេងឆ្ងាយស្រី
lines.translation: I want someone far away, girl
lines.phonetic: bng chngaoy ke phsaeng chhngay srei

lines.line: បងខ្លាចថាពេលឆ្ងាយកាយពីថ្លៃ​ ឆ្ងាយដល់ហឫទ័យ
lines.translation: I'm afraid that time is far from expensive, far to heart
lines.phonetic: bng khlach tha pel chhngay kay pi thlai​  chhngay dl hryty

lines.line: បេះដូងបែកជាបី...ហើយក៏បងត្រូវសោកា
lines.translation: My heart is broken into three ... and I'm sad
lines.phonetic: behdaung bek chea bei... haeyka bng trauv saoka

lines.line: ទោះបីអូនឆ្នាស់បន្តិច  and that's the way she flex
lines.translation: Although I'm a little confused and that's the way she flex
lines.phonetic: tohbei aun chhnasa bantich  and that's the way she flex

lines.line: ហើយដែលពេលអូននាងខឹង
lines.translation: And when you are angry
lines.phonetic: haey del pel aun neang khoeng

lines.line: បេះដូងបង tryna fix, and that's the way you are...
lines.translation: My heart tryna fix, and that's the way you are ...
lines.phonetic: behdaung bng tryna fix, and that's the way you are...

lines.line: អូនខុសពីគេទៅលើសម្រស់ហើយថែមទាំងចរិយា
lines.translation: You are different in beauty and behavior
lines.phonetic: aun khosapi ke towleu samrosa haey themtang chriya

lines.line: មុខអូនមូលក្រឡង់ហើយអាវអូនពាក់ធ្លាក់ស្មា
lines.translation: Your face is round and your shirt is off your shoulder
lines.phonetic: moukh aun moul kralng haey av aun peak thleak sma

lines.line: អូនសុភាពតែកាច​ អោយបងពិបាកនឹងថា
lines.translation: Oun Sopheap, but angry, makes it difficult for you to say
lines.phonetic: aun sophap te kach​  aoy bng pibeak nungtha

lines.line: អូនស្អាតជាងគេទាំងអស់​ នារីនៅឋានកណ្ដាល
lines.translation: You are the most beautiful of all women in the middle
lines.phonetic: aun saat cheangke teangoasa​  neari now thanokandal

lines.line: ឬមិនមែនកូនមនុស្ស​ អូនជាកូនជាទេវតា
lines.translation: Or not the son of man, I am the son of an angel
lines.phonetic: ryy minmen kaun mnoussa​  aun chea kaun chea tevta

lines.line: បងចង់តែនាំអូនចេញពីគេ...ហេ...
lines.translation: I just want to take you away from them ... hey ...
lines.phonetic: bng chng te noam aun chenhpi ke... he...

lines.line: ទៅត្រើយម្ខាងនៃផែនដី ដែលមានតែបងនឹងមាសមេ
lines.translation: To the other side of the earth, only you and the mother gold
lines.phonetic: tow traeyomkheang nei phendei  del meante bng nung measame

words.word: ត្រើយម្ខាង

lines.line: សាងស្នេហ៍នៅកន្លែងដែលគ្មានអ្នកណារកឃើញទេ
lines.translation: Make love in a place where no one can find you
lines.phonetic: sang sne nowkanleng del kmean anaknea rk kheunh te

lines.line: ឈ្មោះអូនចាំនៅក្នុងបេះដូងបងអូនដូចជាពេជ្រ
lines.translation: I remember your name in my heart like a diamond
lines.phonetic: chhmoh aun cham nowknong behdaung bng aun dauchchea pechr

lines.line: បងខ្លាចថាលែងមានថ្ងៃរះ ហើយមានតែថ្ងៃលិច
lines.translation: I'm afraid there will be no sunrise and only sunset
lines.phonetic: bng khlach tha leng mean thngaireah  haey meante thngailich

lines.line: បងខ្លាចថាមានរឿងកើតឡើង ធ្វើឱ្យបេះដូងយើងគ្រិច
lines.translation: I'm afraid something happened that made my heart skip a beat
lines.phonetic: bng khlach tha mean rueng kaetlaeng  thveu aoy behdaung yeung krich

lines.line: បងខ្លាចថាពេលវេលាមើលថែអូនអស់កាតព្វកិច្ច
lines.translation: I'm afraid that the time to take care of you is out of duty
lines.phonetic: bng khlach tha pelvelea meulthe aun asa katapvokechch

words.word: កាតព្វកិច្ច

lines.line: ផ្កាយនៅឆ្ងាយ តែបងត្រូវចាប់ឲ្យបាន
